title: Girl in Street Bookend Rei Twlight Zone Theme
display_title: Girl in Street Bookend Rei Twlight Zone Theme
wikitext:
[]: Girl in Street Bookend Rei *Twlight Zone Theme*             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Apr 17, 2008 8:40 am Okay, so we all know this image from episode 1, Rei standing in traffic. although there have been explanations for why it could happen, why it did happen is something less explored. Why would Rei allow herself to be seen? Is she trying to send a message to Shinji before everything starts? Fortunately, this thread is not about that. What I want you to do is to picture the above scene in your head like it's really happening. I want you to see a ghostly image of Rei standing in the middle of a street 100ft away from you and looking directly at you. Imagine the shock you would feel at blinking and watching her disappear. Now imagine the Unsolved Mysteries theme playing in the background, and Robert Stack giving a voice over for this event. I dunno about you guys, but I felt a chill run up my spine.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Apr 17, 2008 9:20 am well, almost anything involving that damn tune automatically sends the creepy meter OVER 9000 oh, and IN b4 lock

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Apr 17, 2008 10:19 am The opening music from the twilight zone makes anything sound more creepy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr JeburtO » Thu Apr 17, 2008 10:22 am someone edit that pic and make it into one of those "when you see it you'll s**t bricks" things. i only have mspaint, and im writing an essay so i shouldnt even be on here >.<

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Apr 17, 2008 1:43 pm Looks like some girl I don't know standing in the middle of the street, why would I care?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 17, 2008 1:51 pm Changed the topic title to better fit the discussion. If I saw somebody like Rei just staring at me, only to apparently see her again a only an hour or so later, I'd be pretty freaked out. However, if I was only see her just standing there, and to never see her again, I'd probably think nothing of it...Although it is creepy how she just appears then disappears. (btw, the only time Rei blinks is in SPOILERS.) And even though this is about what you brought up, Rei 3/Lilith is at least there in front of Shinji as the whole symbol of "Hope that people will understand each other" deal. Quantum Physics allow her to do such. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Apr 17, 2008 2:34 pm Ornette wrote: Looks like some girl I don't know standing in the middle of the street, why would I care?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Apr 17, 2008 3:40 pm I'd probably just tell the idiot not to stand in the middle of the road.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Thu Apr 17, 2008 3:47 pm Hunter21 wrote: I'd probably just tell the idiot not to stand in the middle of the road.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 17, 2008 4:39 pm Hunter21 wrote: I'd probably just tell the idiot not to stand in the middle of the road.

[]:             Quote Post by Tabasco » Thu Apr 17, 2008 5:07 pm *snicker* Perfect.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Apr 17, 2008 5:21 pm I was using the Unsolved Mysteries theme as a title, not the Twilight Zone theme you dick whomplet!

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Thu Apr 17, 2008 5:40 pm lol. i say she's just curious... okay lol...well perhaps the road itself might mean something metaphorically. like "you're going to encounter me in your life and i'm going to be a major player in it" or something. angels in the way of Shinji's life. idano.....and then the disappearance can symbolize the choice that Shinji can make to leave NERV or to not. hell I don't know if Rei has abilities of precognition so I'm not sure if what I'm saying is even viable. Sorry guys. No time to do an exhaustive study on this.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Apr 17, 2008 5:55 pm The Bastard King wrote: I was using the Unsolved Mysteries theme as a title, not the Twilight Zone theme you dick whomplet!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 17, 2008 5:56 pm @ AyanamiOtaku: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Rei%27s_Ghostly_Appearances_and_Quantum_Mechanics Hope this helps. ;) @ Bastard King: I know, but editing the name didn't fit. Plus, somebody mentioned the Twilight Zone theme and your title looked like that's what it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 17, 2008 7:40 pm I'd probably think I'm going crazy. I already doubt my sanity to a certain extent.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu Apr 17, 2008 7:41 pm WAit...what happneed in those comics?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Apr 17, 2008 7:58 pm Sachi_13 wrote: I'd probably think I'm going crazy. I already doubt my sanity to a certain extent.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Apr 17, 2008 8:01 pm Tch. Sanity is for conformists.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Apr 17, 2008 10:39 pm And this is the part where I intuitively do the Time Warp to follow Rei.
